name: Content Retained Assessment Rework Pipeline
description: Delivery pipeline that retains advisory assessments across subject revisions while refreshing required approvals.
outcome: Rework produces a new revision, keeps designated advisory assessments, and still requires the primary approval to be refreshed.

definition.process_instructions: The platform architect defines the change. The feature engineer implements it. The primary quality assessor must reassess every new revision. The advisory assessor provides non-material guidance that MAY be retained across revisions according to authored retention policy.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.
